summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of IAD Airport Limo luxury website redesign. All features working correctly - hero section with luxury styling, trust badges, fleet section with vehicle images and filtering, services section, testimonials with gold stars, CTA section with city night background, footer with all links, and navigation dropdowns. Mobile responsiveness verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete redesign testing passed. All visual elements using luxury aesthetics: Playfair Display headings, Manrope body text, gold #D4AF37 accents on dark #0A0A0A background. High-quality Unsplash vehicle images loading correctly. Glass morphism navbar, luxury card hover effects all working.

homepage_hero.details: Hero section loads with luxury styling, proper vehicle background image, Playfair Display 'Experience Unparalleled Luxury' heading, gold gradient on 'Unparalleled', Reserve Now and View Fleet buttons visible

trust_badges.details: 4 trust badges displayed: Fully Licensed & Insured, Professional Chauffeurs, 24/7 Availability, 500+ 5-Star Reviews with gold icons

fleet_section.details: 5 vehicle cards on homepage with proper images (Mercedes S-Class, BMW 7 Series, Cadillac Escalade, Lincoln Navigator, Mercedes Sprinter). Filter tabs work (All Vehicles, Sedans, SUV, Sprinter). Gold category badges, pricing, Get Quote buttons

services_section.details: 4 service cards with relevant images: Airport Transfers (airplane image), Corporate Travel, Weddings & Events, Wine Tours. Hover effects reveal 'Learn More' links

stats_section.details: Gold background with stats: 15K+ Completed Rides, 500+ 5-Star Reviews, 50+ Premium Vehicles, 24/7 Availability

testimonials_section.details: 3 testimonial cards with gold 5-star ratings, client quotes in italic, author names and roles. 'Read All Reviews' link works

cta_section.details: 'Your Journey Awaits' heading with city night background image, Book Now gold button and phone number button

footer.details: Premium footer with IAD logo, company description, Services links (5), Company links (6), Contact info, social media icons, copyright 2026, Privacy Policy and Terms links

navigation_dropdowns.details: All 3 dropdowns work - Vehicles (Luxury Sedans, Premium SUVs, Executive Sprinters, View All), Services (5 links), Company (4 links). Glass morphism styling with hover effects

fleet_page.details: /fleet page loads with 'Premium Vehicles' heading, 4 filter categories (All, Luxury Sedans, Premium SUVs, Executive Vans), 8 vehicle cards with detailed info, features, pricing, Book Now buttons

navigation_links.details: All tested links work - View Fleet, Reserve Now, Logo home, Service cards, Read All Reviews

mobile_responsiveness.details: Mobile view (390x844) working - hamburger menu opens/closes, organized menu sections (Services, Vehicles, Company), hero adapts correctly, fleet filter buttons stack properly

images.details: All vehicle images from Unsplash loading correctly - no broken images detected. Mercedes S-Class, BMW 7 Series, Cadillac Escalade, Lincoln Navigator, Mercedes Sprinter, Mercedes E-Class, Chevrolet Suburban, plus service and background images

typography.details: Playfair Display for headings, Manrope for body, Cinzel for accent text. Gold gradient text effect working on hero 'Unparalleled'

color_scheme.details: Dark background #0A0A0A, gold accents #D4AF37, proper text contrast with #F5F5F5 light text and #A3A3A3 muted text
